query:
SELECT 
  sa.emissorNome,
  sa.codigoCetip,
  sa.indexador,
  CAST(sa.taxaIndicativa AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as taxaIndicativa,
  CAST(sa.zspread AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as zspread_bps,
  CAST(sa.ntnbTaxa AS DECIMAL(10,4)) as ntnbTaxa,
  CAST(sa.ntnbDuration AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as ntnbDuration,
  CAST(sa.durationAnos AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as duration,
  sa.ntnbReferencia,
  sa.rating
FROM spread_analysis sa
WHERE sa.incentivado = 1 
  AND sa.zspread IS NOT NULL
  AND sa.indexador LIKE '%IPCA%'
  AND sa.ntnbTaxa IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY sa.zspread DESC
LIMIT 3;

  AND sa.ntnbTaxa IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY sa.zspread DESC
LIMIT 3;
